name: Community insights: search, analyze sentiment, save to Sheets
description: Searches community discussions via Exa, uses Claude AI to analyze sentiment, identify themes, and extract key insights from community conversations, then saves the structured analysis to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Community insights using Qdrant, Python and Information Extractor

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for community discussion search

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving insights

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

topic.description: Topic to analyze community discussions about (e.g. 'AI code assistants', 'remote work tools', 'electric vehicles')

communitySource.description: Community sources to focus on (e.g. 'Reddit', 'Hacker News', 'Stack Overflow')

maxDiscussions.description: Maximum number of discussions to analyze

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for community sentiment analysis
Run Claude AI for sentiment analysis
Build Google Sheets data from insights
Save community insights to Google Sheets
Build Slack summary with Block Kit
